home.hero.title: Corporate ski retreats, elevated
home.hero.description: Transform your next company trip with expertly organized retreats designed to inspire, connect and energize your team.
home.about.title: About us
home.about.description:
SlopeWorks started with us. Two skiers who realised that the best business conversations never happened behind a desk, but on a chairlift, on a mountain peak, or over a long alpine lunch after fresh tracks.

We've experienced ourselves how powerful the mountains can be for connection, clarity and team energy. Away from the office, people open up. Hierarchies fade. Ideas flow.

That's why we created SlopeWorks.
To design premium corporate ski retreats that feel effortless, energising and genuinely meaningful.

Built by skiers. Designed for ambitious teams.

home.about.image2.alt: Team members during a SlopeWorks corporate ski retreat

Time on the mountain. Evenings together. The moments in between.

home.packages.title: Our packages
home.packages.description: Three distinct alpine retreat concepts, each crafted to match your team's objectives, budget and desired level of exclusivity.
home.packages.essential.title: Essential Retreats
home.packages.essential.description:
A well-organised ski experience for teams who want quality without unnecessary extras.

We select a resort that fits your group.
We arrange accommodation in a good, comfortable hotel or chalet.
Transfers, ski passes, rentals and reservations are handled in advance so the trip runs smoothly from the moment you arrive.

The focus is simple: time on the mountain, relaxed dinners, and genuine moments together outside the office.

No overcomplication.
Just a solid, well-executed ski retreat that does exactly what it should.
home.packages.essential.image.alt: Icon representing the Essential Retreat package
home.packages.premium.title: Premium Retreats
home.packages.premium.description:
For teams who want more comfort, more refinement and more attention to detail.

We work with elevated alpine hotels and boutique properties that offer atmosphere and service. Private transfers, curated restaurants and upgraded experiences are seamlessly integrated into the programme.

Everything feels more considered.
More comfortable.
More tailored to your preferences.

This is where the trip becomes more than well-organised; it becomes memorable.
home.packages.premium.image.alt: Icon representing the Premium Retreat package
home.packages.luxury.title: Luxury Retreats
home.packages.luxury.description:
Our highest level of alpine experience.

We collaborate with exceptional mountain properties known for discretion, service and character. From VIP transfers and private ski guides to exclusive dining and fully tailored planning, every element is elevated.

The programme is built around your expectations. Nothing is standard. Everything is considered.

For organisations and founders who expect excellence, privacy and flawless execution.
home.packages.luxury.image.alt: Icon representing the Luxury Retreat package
home.contact.title: Get in touch
home.contact.informationDescription: Ready to explore what your team could achieve in the mountains? Let's start designing an alpine experience tailored to your goals.
home.contact.formDescription: Tell us about your team, ambitions and preferred dates. We will get back to you quickly to shape the perfect retreat together.

home.contact.location.description: Operating across Europe based in the Netherlands & Belgium
